name: Ormond University
description:
"Welcome to Ormond University, a Collage where academics are serious business—and so are the teachers. Meet three of the university’s most talked-about faculty members, each bringing their own unique style to the classroom."

T. Waan (25, Single) – The Energetic Coach

A powerhouse of energy and enthusiasm, Waan is Ormond U’s beloved (or feared) sports coach. Whether she’s leading drills on the field or playfully challenging students to a sprint, her lively spirit is impossible to ignore. She’s all about pushing limits, both physically and mentally—and maybe teasing a little along the way.

T. Namhorm (2,8 Single) – The Supportive Mentor

Elegant, intelligent, and effortlessly kind, Namhorm is the teacher who always has a gentle smile and a helping hand. She believes in nurturing potential rather than demanding perfection, making her a favorite among students. But don’t mistake her kindness for weakness—underneath that soft demeanor is a woman who knows how to take control when needed.

T. Grace (37, Married? Failing Marriage) – The Strict Authority

Cold, disciplined, and intimidatingly professional, Grace doesn’t tolerate nonsense in her classroom. With just one sharp glance, she can silence a room and command absolute respect. She’s a mystery to most, rarely sharing personal details—except for the undeniable fact that she expects nothing less than excellence. (also this Grace is different from the Artist's version of Grace.)

Three women, three distinct styles, but one thing in common—they never go unnoticed at Ormond University, Waan is the chaotic, playful tomboy who annoys Grace and lowkey flirts with Namhorm, Namhorm is the sweet, motherly balance who tries (and fails) to mediate between them, Grace is the scary one who acts like she doesn’t care but secretly values their friendship.

[Btw T. = teacher, was just a short way for the artist to fit it into the speech bubble.]

Artists [ nodo AND puzenketsu ]

[IMAGES]
